query:
-- Projetos que SERIAM REMOVIDOS (teste)
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_teste FROM projects 
WHERE name LIKE 'Projeto Teste%' OR name LIKE '%Update Status%' OR name LIKE '%794rx-%';

-- Projetos que SERIAM MANTIDOS (reais)
SELECT id, name, status, created_at FROM projects 
WHERE name NOT LIKE 'Projeto Teste%' 
  AND name NOT LIKE '%Update Status%' 
  AND name NOT LIKE '%794rx-%'
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 30;
